case_title: CCSF TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE VS. ROY TIDWELL

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TIDWELL, ROY $2,644.00 PRINCIPAL, $97.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,741.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-31-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-31-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN. PLAINTIFF CCSF TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICER IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JOLINDA JACKSON (SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER). DEFENDANT ROY TIDWELL IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED.
